allow:
Bash(git add config/defaults.json src/compress.mjs src/generate-video.mjs && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
V5: HD video pipeline — CRF 18, retina screenshots, proper audio

- Set videoCrf to 18 \(was 23\) for high quality encoding
- Add deviceScaleFactor 2 for retina-quality 3840x2160 screenshots
- Use lanczos downscale filter for sharp 1920x1080 output
- Audio: AAC 128k at 44100 Hz \(was 48k at 24000 Hz mono\)
- Output renamed to wealth-series-vsl-hd.mp4 for download delivery
- Compress script: match audio settings \(128k, 44100 Hz\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git status)
